instructionalDaysDescription: The official IUSD Traditional Calendar lists 180 instructional days for PK-8 and 180 instructional days for high school.
seoDescription: View the IUSD 2027-2028 traditional academic calendar with Aug 18 first day, Jun 2 last day, holidays, breaks, printable PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: IUSD's 2027-2028 Traditional Calendar starts on August 18, 2027 and ends on June 2, 2028. Thanksgiving recess runs November 22-26, winter recess runs December 20-31, and spring recess runs April 3-7. IUSD also publishes a separate Year Round Calendar for 2027-2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Irvine Unified start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Irvine Unified traditional-calendar students start school on Wednesday, August 18, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is IUSD Spring Recess in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess on the IUSD 2027-2028 Traditional Calendar runs Monday, April 3 through Friday, April 7, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for IUSD in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day on the IUSD 2027-2028 Traditional Calendar is Friday, June 2, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: Does IUSD have a 2027-2028 year-round calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. IUSD publishes a separate 2027-2028 Year Round Calendar PDF. This page summarizes the Traditional Calendar and links the year-round PDF under Other Official Calendars.

yearNumbers.label: Longest Instructional Stretch
yearNumbers.detail: The longest uninterrupted instructional weekday stretch after a major break runs from April 10 through May 26, before Memorial Day and the last day.

yearNumbers.label: No-School Mondays
yearNumbers.detail: Monday no-school weekdays include holidays, staff development days, and recess Mondays listed on the traditional calendar.

yearNumbers.label: School-Year Span
yearNumbers.detail: The traditional calendar runs from August 18, 2027 through June 2, 2028, giving families about 42 calendar weeks to coordinate instruction, breaks, camps, childcare, and summer planning.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2026-2027 Calendar
content: IUSD starts on August 18 in both the 2026-2027 and 2027-2028 Traditional Calendars.
The last day moves from June 4 in 2027 to June 2 in 2028.
Spring Recess moves from March 29-April 2 in 2027 to April 3-7 in 2028.

events.name: PK-8 Floating Teacher Work Day
events.description: PK-8 floating teacher work day listed on the official traditional calendar.
